data.title: Paragon Banking Group Continues £50m Buyback With 50,000-Share Purchase
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Paragon Banking Group PLC ( (GB:PAG) ).

Paragon Banking Group PLC has repurchased 50,000 of its £1 ordinary shares on 20 January 2026 via Jefferies International as part of its previously announced up to £50 million share buyback programme. The shares were bought at prices between 886.50p and 895.50p, with a volume-weighted average price of 891.0561p, and the transaction increases the number of shares held in treasury to 5,516,982, leaving 191,887,978 ordinary shares in issue and constituting the company’s total voting rights. This incremental buyback reflects Paragon’s ongoing capital management strategy, potentially supporting earnings per share and shareholder returns while slightly reducing the free float and providing updated voting-rights information for investors subject to UK disclosure and transparency rules.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:PAG) stock is a Buy with a £1060.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Paragon Banking Group PLC stock, see the GB:PAG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:PAG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:PAG is a Neutral.

Overall score reflects attractive valuation (low P/E and high dividend yield) and supportive technical positioning above major moving averages. These positives are tempered by financial risks from rising leverage and notable volatility in revenue and cash flow, which reduce confidence in the stability of recent performance.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:PAG stock, click here.

More about Paragon Banking Group PLC

Paragon Banking Group PLC is a UK-based specialist banking group focused on lending and savings, with a particular emphasis on niche markets such as buy-to-let mortgages, commercial lending and retail deposit products. Listed on the London Stock Exchange, the group serves both individual and institutional customers and actively manages its capital structure through programmes such as share buybacks.

Average Trading Volume: 484,924

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: £1.7B

data.title: Conquest Resources Revises Private Placement to Raise Up to $750,000 for Ontario Exploration
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Conquest Resources ( (TSE:CQR) ) has provided an announcement.

Conquest Resources has amended the terms of its previously announced non-brokered private placement financings to add a hard-dollar share component alongside its charity flow-through offering, for combined potential gross proceeds of up to $750,000. The revised structure comprises up to 6 million charity flow-through shares at $0.075 to fund qualifying Canadian critical mineral exploration expenditures at the Belfast-TeckMag Project in Ontario, and up to 6 million hard-dollar common shares at $0.05 to support working capital and general corporate purposes, with completion subject to regulatory approvals and standard resale restrictions, underscoring the company’s ongoing push to finance exploration at its flagship critical minerals asset.

More about Conquest Resources

Conquest Resources Limited is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on base metals and gold projects in Ontario. Its flagship Belfast-TeckMag Project in the Temagami Mining Camp targets magmatic sulphide (Cu-Ni-PGE), VMS, IOCG, iron formation-hosted and paleo-placer gold deposits over more than 300 square kilometres, including the historic Golden Rose Mine. Conquest also holds the Alexander Gold Property in the Red Lake Gold Camp, along with interests in the Smith Lake Gold Property and Lake Nipigon Basin Property.

Average Trading Volume: 224,541

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$9.48M

Learn more about CQR stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Siemens Energy ( (DE:ENR) ) has provided an update.

Siemens Energy has disclosed that BlackRock, Inc. has increased its attributable voting stake in the company following a change in BlackRock’s group structure. According to the notification, BlackRock’s total voting rights position in Siemens Energy rose from 7.44% to 8.02% as of 19 January 2026, comprising 7.77% held via shares and 0.25% through financial instruments such as securities lending and contracts for difference, signaling a modest strengthening of the asset manager’s influence among the company’s shareholder base.

data.title: Tiziana Life Sciences’ Intranasal Foralumab MS Study Published in Leading Neurology Journal
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Tiziana Life Sciences ( (TLSA) ) has issued an update.

On January 20, 2026, Tiziana Life Sciences announced that results from its open-label clinical study of intranasal foralumab in patients with non-active secondary progressive multiple sclerosis have been peer-reviewed and published in Neurology Neuroimmunology & Neuroinflammation, a journal of the American Academy of Neurology. The study, which previously reported positive data on May 6, 2025, is the first to combine TSPO-PET imaging, proteomics and clinical assessments in this patient population, showing no serious treatment-related adverse events, stabilization or improvement in disability scores, reduced fatigue in most patients, absence of new MRI lesions, and significant reductions in microglial activation alongside biomarker evidence of increased regulatory T cells and TGFβ expression. Investigators and company leaders framed the publication as a major external validation of intranasal foralumab’s differentiated mechanism of modulating CNS inflammation without broad systemic immunosuppression, strengthening Tiziana’s position in the multiple sclerosis treatment landscape as it progresses an ongoing randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled Phase 2 trial in non-active secondary progressive MS, with top-line data expected in the first half of 2026.

The most recent analyst rating on (TLSA) stock is a Buy with a $8.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tiziana Life Sciences stock, see the TLSA Stock Forecast page.

More about Tiziana Life Sciences

Tiziana Life Sciences is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing breakthrough immunotherapies using alternative drug delivery technologies, particularly intranasal administration. Its lead candidate, intranasal foralumab, is the only fully human anti-CD3 monoclonal antibody currently in clinical development and is being advanced primarily for neuroinflammatory and neurodegenerative diseases such as non-active secondary progressive multiple sclerosis, with a broader pipeline enabled by its patented delivery platform.

Average Trading Volume: 306,387

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $199.7M

Learn more about TLSA stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

The latest announcement is out from Jyske Bank A/S ( (GB:0MGD) ).

Jyske Bank A/S has disclosed that French financial group Société Générale S.A. has built an indirect position of 3,208,942 Jyske Bank shares, equivalent to 5.22% of the bank’s total share capital, as of 15 January 2026. data.title: SuperQ and 01 Quantum Partner to Deliver End-to-End Quantum-Safe Cybersecurity
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Atco Mining Inc. ( (TSE:QBTQ) ) has provided an announcement.

SuperQ Quantum Computing Inc. has entered a strategic partnership with 01 Quantum Inc. to integrate 01 Quantum’s patent-protected IronCAP post-quantum cryptography into SuperQ’s SuperPQC offering, turning it from a purely diagnostic AI tool into a full end-to-end quantum security solution. The combined platform will allow enterprises to both identify “harvest-now, decrypt-later” vulnerabilities and implement quantum-safe encryption and digital signing across key systems like email, VPNs, file storage, cloud services, websites and blockchains, positioning SuperQ to capture a larger share of the growing quantum cybersecurity market while increasing platform stickiness and providing a turnkey PQC stack for auditors and consulting firms seeking to align clients with emerging NIST standards.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:QBTQ) stock is a Hold with a C$1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Atco Mining Inc. stock, see the TSE:QBTQ Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:QBTQ Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:QBTQ is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by weak financial performance (no revenue, widening losses, negative free cash flow, and negative equity). Technicals are supportive but look overbought, while valuation support is limited due to a negative P/E and no dividend. Positive corporate events (product announcements and financing) provide some offset but do not overcome the current financial risk profile.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:QBTQ stock, click here.

More about Atco Mining Inc.

SuperQ Quantum Computing Inc. is a Calgary-based quantum and supercomputing company focused on reducing technical and financial barriers to commercialization of advanced computing. Through its flagship Super™ platform and consumer-facing ChatQLM product, SuperQ aims to make quantum and supercomputing accessible and intuitive for enterprises, research institutions and government agencies across sectors such as finance, healthcare, logistics and defense, using proprietary AI “Autopilots” to deliver one-click, business-ready outcomes.

data.title: Vast Resources Sets AGM as It Prepares Shareholder Vote on Gulf Minerals Deal
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Vast Resources ( (GB:VAST) ) just unveiled an update.

Vast Resources has called its Annual General Meeting for 11:00 a.m. on 12 February 2026 at Nettlestead Place in Kent, with the formal notice, proxy form and chairman’s letter now posted to shareholders and available on the company’s website. In his letter, Chairman Brian Moritz explains that the AGM timetable was delayed to align, as far as possible, with a separate General Meeting required to approve the proposed acquisition of Tajikistan-focused Gulf International Minerals and related share issuance and Rule 9 waiver under the UK Takeover Code; while differing notice periods prevent the two meetings being formally combined at this stage, the board may adjourn the AGM if the AIM admission document is published during the AGM notice period so both meetings can proceed together, giving investors a clearer view of the transaction’s implications for Vast’s growth strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:VAST) stock is a Hold with a £0.11 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Vast Resources stock, see the GB:VAST Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:VAST Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:VAST is a Underperform.

Vast Resources is struggling with significant financial and operational challenges, including declining revenues and negative profitability. The technical indicators suggest a bearish trend, and the valuation metrics are poor. These factors collectively result in a low overall stock score.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:VAST stock, click here.

More about Vast Resources

Vast Resources plc is an AIM-quoted mining company focused on developing and operating mineral assets. The latest update is out from Wise PLC Class A ( (GB:WISE) ).

Wise plc has disclosed that Chief People Officer Isabel Naidoo and Chief Legal Officer Jessica Winter have both sold portions of their holdings in the company’s Class A ordinary shares, in transactions reported under UK Market Abuse Regulation. Naidoo disposed of 20,000 shares at £9.374904 each and Winter sold 3,000 shares at £9.510764 each, with both transactions executed on 20 January 2026 on the London Stock Exchange’s Main Market, providing investors with updated visibility on insider dealing activity but without indicating any change to their roles or to the company’s strategic direction.
